# Repository Metadata

Suggested GitHub repository settings for public release.

## Description

```text
Minimal macOS menu bar app for local Calendar meeting reminders.
```

## Topics

```text
macos
swift
swiftui
menubar
calendar
eventkit
meeting-reminder
google-calendar
productivity
```

## Homepage

Use the latest GitHub Release URL after publishing the first release:

```text
https://github.com/iqbaldp/gmeet-reminder/releases/latest
```

## About

Enable:

- Releases
- Issues
- Discussions, optional

Disable if not needed:

- Wiki
